name: TestRail
description: Monitor TestRail test management for QA coverage and code quality compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to TestRail
2. Go to your Profile → API Keys and generate a key
3. Base64 encode 'your_email:api_key'
4. Enter your TestRail URL and encoded credentials below

credentialFields.label: Encoded Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'email:api_key'. Enable API key in TestRail: Profile → API Keys. Command: echo -n 'user@email.com:api_key' | base64

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies TestRail test projects and suites are configured to track code changes

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Verifies TestRail test runs are being executed to validate code quality
